name: VideoSEMA: a scalable and efficient Mamba-like attention for video understanding
summary: arXiv:2607.14711v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present for video understanding (classification) a split space-time attention model, VideoSEMA, consisting of a scalable and efficient Mamba-lik...
description: arXiv:2607.14711v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We present for video understanding (classification) a split space-time attention model, VideoSEMA, consisting of a scalable and efficient Mamba-like attention (SEMA) block in space and a softmax temporal attention in time. In each frame, SEMA attention applies a local window attention in parallel with a global averaging in a Mamba macro-architec...
author: Nhat Thanh Tran, Fanghui Xue andShuai Zhang, Jiancheng Lyu, Yunling Zheng, Yingyong Qi, Jack Xin
